changelog: Redesigned toolbar — cleaner single bar with centered scorecards
Added dedicated title bar with Workspace Watchdog branding and sync status
View mode (Main / Active Now / Suspicious) now a dropdown instead of three buttons
Filters and tools moved behind gear icon drawer — keeps toolbar uncluttered
Detail pane now scrolls independently — no longer pushes Trends section down
Globe travel arc altitude lowered — arcs hug closer to globe surface
Removed empty status bar row at bottom of map
Scorecard numbers larger and always centered regardless of globe controls showing
Toolbar stays full brightness — removed auto-dim behavior
Night Earth texture label hidden in globe mode to prevent overflow
